raw.title: Messages of Fierce Hope From the Global South
raw.excerpt: An offering of inspiration from activists in the Global South, including Mexico, Lebanon, Bangladesh, Myanmar, Thailand to help people in the U.S. navigate these difficult times.

llm_processed.summary: Shares stories of grassroots resistance and hope from the Global South, emphasizing solidarity and alternative development pathways.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Bridges to global networks of knowledge-sharing and collaborative innovation for sustainability.
